description: Lists the image IDs inside Schuylkill County, Pennsylvania probate image group 007936752 — the SECOND of the two browse-only films the Schuylkill probate run is split across (1891-1930; the first is 007936749, 1851-1890, via image-search-schuylkill-probate). Drives the multi-film-span browse (ut_search_images_011): the skill should call image_search on BOTH covering films, so this fixture provides the second film's images. 18 images, sorted by the trailing page number.
